abstracts.abstract: Prohibits ICE employees, agents or officials from being within two hundred feet (200') of any polling place during voting, including early voting and election day voting.

bill.title: AN ACT RELATING TO ELECTIONS -- CONDUCT OF ELECTION AND VOTING EQUIPMENT, AND SUPPLIES

posted_text:
🗳️ RI S3339 — Prohibits ICE employees, agents or officials from being within two hundred feet (200') of any polling place during voting, including early voting and election day voting.

This law prevents ICE personnel – including agents and officials – from being within 200 feet of any polling place during elections, early voting, or election day.

June 22, 2026: Signed by Governor.

🔗 Read the full bill: https://webserver.rilegislature.gov/BillText26/SenateText26/S3339.htm

#ElectionsVotingRights #RhodeIsland #Legislation #StateLegislature #CivicTech
